context.role: eating animation triggered when player feeds Echo
context.screen_position: center (x=64, y=60), head moves toward food bowl (lower left)
context.usage_scenario: plays once when feed action is performed, increases happiness by +15

visual_specification.shape: cockatiel bending down toward food bowl, head lowered
visual_specification.texture: pixel art with minimal dithering, hand-drawn organic feel
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on key features only

animation.description: F1-3: head lowering toward bowl, F4: beak opens, F5: beak closes (pecking seed), F6: head raising back up

visual_specification.details: beak opens and closes to peck seeds, body leans forward, tail feathers shift for balance, eyes focused on food bowl, crest in normal position

relationships.shared_with: all Echo states share same base body structure and color palette
relationships.differences_from: unique head-down pose, beak animation, directional focus toward food bowl; transitions from/to idle state

explicit_negations: no motion blur or tweening between frames
no seeds visibly entering mouth (too detailed for 40x40px)
no chewing animation (single peck is sufficient)
animation must not loop (plays once then returns to idle)
